chapter_title: Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
text:
(a) The commissioners court may adopt orders for administration of this subchapter.

(b) The commissioners court by order shall provide for:

(1) spacing requirements between signs;

(2) height and face restrictions for the total panel area; and

(3) size and face restrictions for each business sign on a motorist information panel.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 395. Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
##### § 395.054 — Regulation of Business Signs

(a) The commissioners court may adopt orders for administration of this subchapter.

(b) The commissioners court by order shall provide for:

    (1) spacing requirements between signs;

    (2) height and face restrictions for the total panel area; and

    (3) size and face restrictions for each business sign on a motorist information panel.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The commissioners court may adopt orders for administration of this subchapter.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The commissioners court by order shall provide for:
height and face restrictions for the total panel area; and
size and face restrictions for each business sign on a motorist information panel.
